reopen_rule: Satisfied lower gates may only be reopened by current regression receipt.
blocking_reasons: Only the fifth ordered Gate D ratification step is executable now; learned-router authorization and lobe work remain blocked by order.
Externality widening, external comparative claims, and commercial activation remain deferred to later gates or later explicit authorization.
Tracked carrier receipts on main remain non-authoritative and cannot stand in for Gate D or B04 authority.
